title: Lingmo OS 1.0 — Inception
content:
We are proud to announce the first stable release of Lingmo OS. Built on Debian 13 with a custom desktop environment, Lingmo OS brings a fresh, modern experience to Linux users worldwide.

## Key Features
- **Lingmo Desktop Environment**: A modern, intuitive desktop built with GTK4 and tailored for productivity.
- **Wayland by Default**: Experience smooth, secure graphics with Wayland as the default display server.
- **Performance Optimizations**: Boot times under 5 seconds on modern hardware, with minimal memory usage.
- **Enhanced Security**: Full disk encryption, secure boot support, and regular security updates.
- **Software Center**: Curated app store with thousands of free and open-source applications.

title: Lingmo OS 1.1 Beta — Refinement
content:
The beta release of Lingmo OS 1.1 is now available for testing. This release focuses on refinement and new features.

## What's New
- Redesigned Settings panel with improved navigation
- Updated kernel to version 6.9
- New default wallpaper collection
- Performance improvements across the desktop
- Bug fixes and stability enhancements
